post.summary: API for providing allowed campaign details for conversion ids
post.description:
This API fetches a list of campaign details which can be associated with provided conversion ids based on isGroup flag.Group details are fetched when isGroup is true otherwise basic list of campaigns are fetched.
---


**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. Setting the page number to -1 will disable pagination and return all data in a single page. |
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page.  The default value is 50. |
| searchField `[optional]` | String | Search the result by provided keyword in the searchField.  |
| conversionIds `[required]`  | Array of Integer | Conversion Ids which needs to be excluded from the campaign which have pixel conversions already attached. |
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign.  |

Basic Campaign List.description: This response contains all details about campaign as a list.

post.summary: Send Email for Universal Pixel Integration.
post.description:
Sends an email containing the Universal Pixel script tag and conversion details to one or more recipients.
The email subject and greeting text are fully customisable by the caller.

---

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field**       | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                                                 | **Validation**                               |
|-----------------|----------|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| conversionId    | Integer  | Required     | ID of the Universal Pixel conversion whose script tag is to be shared.          | Must be ≥ 1 and owned by the caller's owId. |
| recipients      | String   | Required     | Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses.                              | Each address must be a valid email format.   |
| emailSubject    | String   | Required     | Subject line for the outgoing email.                                            | Must not be blank.                           |
| emailText       | String   | Optional     | Opening greeting text rendered in the email body (supports `${userName}` token).| —                                            |

---

#### Notes

- The Universal Pixel feature must be enabled for the caller's organisation (`isUniversalPixelEnabled`).
- `owId` and `uowId` are resolved from the authenticated session; do **not** pass them in the request body.

Request payload for sending a Universal.description: Request payload for sending a Universal Pixel integration email

value.emailText: Hello ${userName} has sent you a Universal Pixel code to integrate. Please follow the steps below.

value.data: Universal Pixel conversion e-mail sent successfully.

errorObjects.error: recipients can not be null or empty.

post.summary: Create a Universal Pixel type Conversion.
post.description:
Creates a new Universal Pixel type conversion and returns the full conversion record.
Use this endpoint to set up a universal-pixel-based conversion that tracks user actions via a JavaScript snippet embedded on a webpage.

---

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field**                                        | **Type**  | **Required** | **Description**                                                                                         | **Validation / Notes**                                                  |
|--------------------------------------------------|-----------|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| name                                             | String    | Required     | Display name for the conversion.                                                                        | 3–255 characters, not blank.                                            |
| attributionId                                    | Integer   | Required     | Attribution model for this conversion.                                                                  | `1` = HYBRID, `2` = CLICK_BASED, `3` = VIEW_BASED. Must be a valid id. |
| conversionSetting                                | Object    | Required     | Advanced settings for the conversion.                                                                   | Must not be null.                                                       |
| conversionSetting.conversionDuration             | Object    | Required     | Post-view and post-click attribution window durations.                                                  | Must not be null.                                                       |
| conversionSetting.conversionDuration.view        | Integer   | Optional     | Post-view attribution window in days.                                                                   | 1–30. Overridden to system default when `attributionId` = CLICK_BASED. |
| conversionSetting.conversionDuration.click       | Integer   | Optional     | Post-click attribution window in days.                                                                  | 7–60. Overridden to system default when `attributionId` = VIEW_BASED.  |
| conversionSetting.repeatConversion               | Object    | Required     | Controls how repeated conversions from the same user are counted.                                       | Must not be null.                                                       |
| conversionSetting.repeatConversion.count         | Integer   | Required     | Maximum number of repeat conversions to count per user.                                                 | Not null.                                                               |
| conversionSetting.repeatConversion.frequency     | Integer   | Required     | Frequency interval for repeat conversion counting.                                                      | Not null.                                                               |
| conversionSetting.repeatConversion.unit          | String    | Required     | Time unit for the repeat frequency window.                                                              | Not blank. e.g. `"Day"`, `"Hour"`.                                      |
| conversionSetting.crossModelling                 | Boolean   | Optional     | Whether cross-device modelling is enabled for attribution.                                              | Defaults to `false`.                                                    |

---

#### Defaults applied automatically

- `status` is always set to **Pending** on creation.
- `type` is always set to **Universal Pixel**.
- A unique `uuid` is auto-generated and assigned.
- `owId`, `createdByUowId`, and `modifiedByUowId` are resolved from the authenticated session.
- After a successful insert, a data-sync event (`CREATE_UNIVERSAL_PIXEL_CONVERSION`) is dispatched to downstream systems.

Request payload for creating a Universal.description: Request payload for creating a Universal Pixel Conversion

Response for successful Universal Pixel.description: Response for successful Universal Pixel Conversion creation

errorObjects.error: Conversion name must be between 3 and 255 characters
There should be conversion setting present.

patch.summary: Update the name of an existing Universal Pixel Conversion.
patch.description:
Partially updates a Universal Pixel conversion record — currently supports renaming only.
Use this endpoint when the user needs to change the display name of an existing Universal Pixel conversion.

---

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field** | **Type**   | **Required** | **Description**                                                      | **Validation**                         |
|-----------|------------|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------|
| id        | Integer    | Required     | Unique identifier of the Universal Pixel conversion to be updated.   | Must refer to a valid conversion owned by the caller's `owId`. |
| name      | String     | Required     | New display name for the conversion.                                 | Must be 3–255 characters, not blank.   |

Request payload for renaming a Universal.description: Request payload for renaming a Universal Pixel Conversion

Response for successful Universal Pixel.description: Response for successful Universal Pixel Conversion update

errorObjects.error: Conversion name must be between 3 and 255 characters
